Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher.ObservablePublisher

Packages that use ObservablePublisher
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable
Observable SPI and core implementations for the failover lifecycle.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher
Observable publisher SPI and built-in implementations.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.
com.societegenerale.failover.observable.micrometer
Micrometer-backed observability for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.async
Non-blocking write decorator for FailoverStore.

  • Uses of ObservablePublisher in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return ObservablePublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ObservablePublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverObservablePublisher(CompositeObservablePublisher composite, FailoverProperties properties)
    The dispatching publisher used by the failover handler and the startup observer — wrapping the CompositeObservablePublisher in an AsyncObservablePublisher so metric publishing can never block or slow the caller's @Failover call (the core observability contract).
    ObservablePublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.loggerObservablePublisher()
    Registers a ObservablePublisher that writes failover reports to SLF4J.
    ObservablePublisher
    FailoverMicrometerAutoConfiguration.micrometerObservablePublisher(io.micrometer.core.instrument.MeterRegistry meterRegistry, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<AbstractSnapshotPublisher> snapshotPublisher)
    Emits failover.store.total, failover.recover.total, failover.exception.total, and failover.operation.duration meters.
    Method parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with type arguments of type ObservablePublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompositeObservablePublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.compositeObservablePublisher(List<ObservablePublisher> observablePublishers, FailoverClock clock)
    Registers a composite publisher that stamps the publish timestamp once and broadcasts to every ObservablePublisher in the context.

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable with parameters of type ObservablePublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DefaultFailoverObserver(ObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)
    Creates a reporter with all required collaborators.

  • Uses of ObservablePublisher in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher that implement ObservablePublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractObservablePublisher
    Base ObservablePublisher that delegates publishing to AbstractObservablePublisher.doPublish(com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.Metrics).
    class 
    AsyncObservablePublisher
    Non-blocking ObservablePublisher decorator: it guarantees that publishing failover metrics can never block or slow the caller's @Failover business call.
    class 
    CompositeObservablePublisher
    ObservablePublisher that stamps the publish timestamp once and fans metrics out to a list of delegate publishers.
    class 
    MdcLoggerObservablePublisher
    AbstractObservablePublisher that publishes failover metrics by writing each metric entry into the MDC before emitting a single INFO log line, then restoring the prior MDC state.
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher with parameters of type ObservablePublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AsyncObservablePublisher(ObservablePublisher delegate, int queueCapacity)
     
    Constructor parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher with type arguments of type ObservablePublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CompositeObservablePublisher(List<ObservablePublisher> delegates, FailoverClock clock)
    Creates a composite publisher that forwards to each delegate in order.

  • Uses of ObservablePublisher in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience with parameters of type ObservablePublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ResilienceFailoverExecution(FailoverHandler<T> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry, @Nullable ObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
    Creates a resilience-backed failover execution that also publishes upstream-call latency.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MicrometerObservablePublisher
    ObservablePublisher that emits real Micrometer meters on every store/recover event.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FailoverStoreAsync(FailoverStore<T> failoverStore, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor executor, @Nullable ObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
    Creates an async decorator that additionally reports executor-side failures to the given publisher.
